title: Fish Tracker Mod
description: This is a mod related to the CosmosMc minecraft server that tracks fish caught on the server.
body:
# FishTracker

A Minecraft Fabric mod that automatically tracks your caught fish on CosmosMc and sends the data to a remote API for statistics and analysis.

## Features

- **Automatic Tracking**: Parses chat messages to detect fish catches and rarities.
- **Secure Sending**: Uses Fernet encryption to protect your data.
- **Easy Configuration**: In-game GUI for settings, accessible via keybind (default: K).
- **Debug Support**: Optional logging for troubleshooting.

## Requirements

- Fabric API
- Cloth Config
- PetarLib
- ModMenu (optional)

Download and place in your mods folder. Configure with your API credentials to start tracking!
